entity.label: Pudens
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Bashful, a Christian at Rome, who sent his greetings to Timothy (2 Tim. 4:21).

nodes.label: Pudens
nodes.description: Bashful, a Christian at Rome, who sent his greetings to Timothy (2 Tim. 4:21).

verses.text: Do thy diligence to come before winter. Eubulus greeteth thee, and Pudens, and Linus, and Claudia, and all the brethren.
